title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 392.190 - Application of sections 392.190 to 392.530
text:
392.190.  Application of sections 392.190 to 392.530. — The provisions of sections 392.190 to 392.530 shall apply to telecommunications service between one point and another within the state of Missouri and to every telecommunications company.
(RSMo 1939 § 5663, A.L. 1987 H.B. 360) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5207; 1919 § 10495
